category_sources: Official GitHub README says Spago is a PureScript package manager and build tool.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is spago and source_facts.description identifies it as PureScript package manager and build tool.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, tutorial, concepts, commands, publishing, and configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source-control project URL and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says PureScript package manager and build tool; source_facts.executables lists spago CLI.
